title: Bedford train crash special broadcast
description: Janine Machin presents a special programme with the latest on the fatal train crash.
content:
Live broadcast from 18:00 BST
Janine Machin will present a live show looking at the aftermath of the Bedford train crash, from 18:00-19:00 BST.

title: Man charged with terrorism-linked attempted murders after Edinburgh attacks
description: Lewis Hawkes, 36, charged with five counts of attempted murder ‘aggravated by reason of having a terrorist connection’
content:
A 36-year-old man has been charged with five counts of attempted murder “aggravated by reason of having a terrorist connection” after a series of attacks in Edinburgh last Friday.

title: Two children found dead in car during French heatwave
description: Deaths blamed on record-breaking temperatures as schools close and trains are cancelled owing to extreme weather
content:
Two young children were found dead in a car in southern France on Monday as a record-breaking heatwave engulfed Europe.
The extreme temperatures forced schools to close, trains to be cancelled and Britain to issue its highest extreme heat warning.

title: Woman dies after medical emergency on Southbourne beach
description: A WOMAN has died on Southbourne beach after suffering a medical incident, police have confirmed.
content:
Police were called to the beach on the afternoon of Monday, June 22, to assist with a medical emergency.
Witnesses saw emergency services perform CPR after police, paramedics, and the coastguard flocked to the promenade.

title: tonne Widnes cardboard fire seen for miles
description: The blaze involves about 450 tonnes of cardboard and large plumes of smoke can be seen for miles.
content:
Smoke from 450-tonne cardboard fire seen for miles
Firefighters are tackling a large blaze involving about 450 tonnes of cardboard.
